subject: Fw: Peggy Siegal: Vanity Fair
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, October 28, 2006 6:44:12 PM
Subject: Peggy Siegal: Vanity Fair


Do you all know about this?  David Margolick is writing....John Connerly is helping to report.  Can only assume Jeffrey does not want me to talk to this reporter....not unless he wants certain things said on his behalf...xxoo Peggy

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

-----Original Message-----
From: Margolick@aol.com
Date:   Sat, 28 Oct 2006 10:36:55

To:peggy@peggysiegal.com
Subject: Re: VOLVER screening - please specify which time you'd like to attend

I don't know which issue it will be...it's due in a few weeks.The story won't be bad, but fair:he'sa complex 
guy.It helps if his friends talk to me honesty and if he speaks some, too.
